title: Exact Block Models
description: Makes all block models accurate to their actual size.
body:
Makes all block models accurate to their actual size, useful for parkour and technical purposes.

Originally was intended to be an addon for [[this pack]](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/accurate-block-models-parkour/), but my approach was a bit different. Specifically I mostly only modified the models, so I ended up making the whole thing myself, which means it is standalone. Also the filesize is smaller :3

Some questions you might get:\
Q: Why does soul sand, mud, and some snow layers make adjacent blocks see through?\
A: MC is coded to hide block sides when they are covered by other blocks, which these blocks by default do. And changing the model doesn't change this behavior sadly. I know some solutions, but I don't like them.

Q: Why does the first layer of snow have a carpet texture?\
A: Since the first layer has no hitbox at all, I want it to stand out a bit, but I may change the texture to something else eventually.

*Not all supported blocks are on the thumbnail, but please tell me if I forgot any in the actual pack!
